name: Carrot Cake Muffin Treats
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the whole wheat flour, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, and ginger.
2. Add the egg, vegetable oil, raisins, walnuts, lowfat milk, and grated carrots to the dry ingredients.
3. Stir until all ingredients are well blended.
4. Spoon the batter into an oiled muffin tin or paper muffin cups, filling each cavity about 2/3 full.
5. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center of a muffin comes out clean.
6. Allow the muffins to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before removing them.
1 muffin - 127 calories, 1 bread, 1 fat exchange 19 grams carbohydrate, 4 grams protein, 5 grams fat 149 mg sodium, 201 mg potassium, 23 mg cholesterol
Source: Am. Diabetes Assoc. Holiday Cookbook by Betty Wedman, 1986
Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, Nov 93
